params.name: limit
params.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter storage objects by name (partial match supported).

params.name: content_type
params.description: Filter storage objects by content type.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter storage objects by state.

params.name: search
params.description: Search by object ID or name.

params.name: include_total_count
params.description: If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

items.docs: List all Objects for the authenticated account with pagination support.
Create a new Object with content and metadata. The Object will be assigned a unique ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.

items.docs: List all public Objects with pagination support.
Returns a list of all available metadata keys that can be used for filtering objects.

info.name: List values for a specific object metadata key.

params.name: key
params.description: The metadata key to get values for.

items.docs: Returns a list of all values that exist for a specific metadata key across all objects.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Object to retrieve.

items.docs: Retrieve a specific Object by its unique identifier.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Object to complete.

items.docs: Mark an Object's upload as complete, transitioning it from UPLOADING to READ-only state.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Object to delete.

items.docs: Delete an existing Object by ID. This action is irreversible and will remove the Object and all its metadata.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Object to generate download URL for.

params.name: duration_seconds
params.description: Duration in seconds for the presigned URL validity (default: 3600).

items.docs: Generate a presigned download URL for an Object. The URL will be valid for the specified duration.
